      • uploadToGpu(primitive: Primitive)
Source   Edit  

This file handles rendering for PBR.

Imports

../../common, ../../models, ../../shaders, ../../ktx2, common, ../shaders

Types

Renderer = ref object
  window*: Window
Source   Edit  

Vars

environmentMapId: GLuint
Source   Edit   
environmentMipCount: float32
Source   Edit   
envMapFBO: GLuint
Source   Edit   
pbrShader: GLuint
Source   Edit

Source   Edit

Source   Edit   
shadowMapFbo: GLuint
Source   Edit   
shadowMapTex: GLuint
Source   Edit   
skyboxShader: GLuint
Source   Edit   
skyboxVao: GLuint
Source   Edit   
skyboxVbo: GLuint
Source   Edit  

Consts

envMapSize = 512
Source   Edit   
FragmentEntryPoint = "main"
Source   Edit   
PbrFragmentShader = "#version 410\n// from gltfPbrFrag\n\nuniform vec2 occlusionUvOffset;\nuniform vec4 ambientLightColor;\nuniform sampler2D emissiveTexture;\nuniform vec2 normalUvOffset;\nuniform vec3 cameraPosition;\nuniform float metallicRoughnessUvRotation;\nuniform int baseColorTexCoord;\nuniform float alphaCutoff;\nuniform float occlusionStrength;\nuniform vec2 baseColorUvOffset;\nuniform vec4 tint;\nuniform vec4 rimLightColor;\nuniform int emissiveTexCoord;\nuniform float normalScale;\nuniform vec4 sunLightColor;\nuniform sampler2D normalTexture;\nuniform samplerCube environmentMap;\nuniform vec2 baseColorUvScale;\nuniform vec2 metallicRoughnessUvScale;\nuniform float shadowBias;\nuniform float environmentMipCount;\nuniform vec3 sunLightDirection;\nuniform float transmissionFactor;\nuniform int debugViewMode;\nuniform vec2 emissiveUvOffset;\nuniform int occlusionTexCoord;\nuniform bool useShadow;\nuniform int normalTexCoord;\nuniform vec2 emissiveUvScale;\nuniform sampler2D baseColorTexture;\nuniform sampler2D metallicRoughnessTexture;\nuniform vec3 rimLightDirection;\nuniform float normalUvRotation;\nuniform vec2 shadowMapTexelSize;\nuniform sampler2DShadow shadowMap;\nuniform vec2 metallicRoughnessUvOffset;\nuniform float roughnessFactor;\nuniform vec2 normalUvScale;\nuniform vec4 baseColorFactor;\nuniform vec2 occlusionUvScale;\nuniform float occlusionUvRotation;\nuniform vec3 emissiveFactor;\nuniform float baseColorUvRotation;\nuniform float metallicFactor;\nuniform sampler2D occlusionTexture;\nuniform int metallicRoughnessTexCoord;\nuniform float emissiveUvRotation;\nuniform bool useNormalTexture;\n\nvec2 selectUv(int texCoord, vec2 uv, vec2 uv1);\nvec2 transformUv(vec2 uv, vec2 offset, vec2 scale, float rotation);\n\nvec2 selectUv(\n  int texCoord,\n  vec2 uv,\n  vec2 uv1\n) {\n  vec2 result;\n  result = ((texCoord == 1) ? (uv1) : (uv));\n  return result;\n}\nvec2 transformUv(\n  vec2 uv,\n  vec2 offset,\n  vec2 scale,\n  float rotation\n) {\n  vec2 result;\n  float c = cos(rotation);\n  float s = sin(rotation);\n  vec2 scaled = uv * scale;\n  vec2 transformed = vec2(c * scaled.x + s * scaled.y, - (s) * scaled.x + c * scaled.y) + offset;\n  result = transformed;\n  return result;\n}\n\nin vec3 worldPos;\nin vec4 color;\nin vec3 normal;\nin vec2 uv;\nin vec2 uv1;\nin vec3 tangent;\nin vec3 bitangent;\nin vec4 vPosLightSpace;\nout vec4 fragColor;\n\nvoid main() {\n  vec2 baseColorUv = transformUv(selectUv(baseColorTexCoord, uv, uv1), baseColorUvOffset, baseColorUvScale, baseColorUvRotation);\n  vec2 metallicRoughnessUv = transformUv(selectUv(metallicRoughnessTexCoord, uv, uv1), metallicRoughnessUvOffset, metallicRoughnessUvScale, metallicRoughnessUvRotation);\n  vec2 normalUv = transformUv(selectUv(normalTexCoord, uv, uv1), normalUvOffset, normalUvScale, normalUvRotation);\n  vec2 occlusionUv = transformUv(selectUv(occlusionTexCoord, uv, uv1), occlusionUvOffset, occlusionUvScale, occlusionUvRotation);\n  vec2 emissiveUv = transformUv(selectUv(emissiveTexCoord, uv, uv1), emissiveUvOffset, emissiveUvScale, emissiveUvRotation);\n  fragColor = texture(baseColorTexture, baseColorUv);\n  fragColor = fragColor * baseColorFactor;\n  fragColor = fragColor * color;\n  if ((fragColor).a < alphaCutoff) {\n    discard;\n  }\n  vec3 albedo = (fragColor).rgb;\n  float roughness = (texture(metallicRoughnessTexture, metallicRoughnessUv)).g * roughnessFactor;\n  float metallic = (texture(metallicRoughnessTexture, metallicRoughnessUv)).b * metallicFactor;\n  float transmission = clamp(transmissionFactor, 0.0, 1.0);\n  float ambientOcclusion = (texture(occlusionTexture, occlusionUv)).r * occlusionStrength;\n  vec3 emissiveValue = (texture(emissiveTexture, emissiveUv)).rgb * emissiveFactor;\n  vec3 geometricNormal = normalize(cross(dFdx(worldPos), dFdy(worldPos)));\n  vec3 meshNormal = ((0.0 < length(normal)) ? (normalize(normal)) : (geometricNormal));\n  vec3 normalValue = normalize((texture(normalTexture, normalUv)).rgb * 2.0 - vec3(1.0, 1.0, 1.0)) * normalScale;\n  vec3 mappedNormal = normalize((tangent * normalValue.x + bitangent * normalValue.y) + normal * normalValue.z);\n  vec3 computedNormal = ((useNormalTexture) ? (mappedNormal) : (meshNormal));\n  if (! (gl_FrontFacing)) {\n    computedNormal = - (computedNormal);\n  }\n  vec3 sunDir = normalize(- (sunLightDirection));\n  vec3 rimDir = normalize(- (rimLightDirection));\n  vec3 viewDir = normalize(cameraPosition - worldPos);\n  vec3 reflectDir = reflect(- (viewDir), computedNormal);\n  vec3 halfVector = normalize(viewDir + sunDir);\n  float nDotH = max(dot(computedNormal, halfVector), 0.0);\n  float nDotL = max(dot(computedNormal, sunDir), 0.0);\n  vec3 f0 = vec3(0.04, 0.04, 0.04);\n  vec3 f0mix = mix(f0, albedo, metallic);\n  float cosTheta = max(dot(computedNormal, viewDir), 0.0);\n  vec3 fresnel = f0mix + (vec3(1.0, 1.0, 1.0) - f0mix) * pow(1.0 - cosTheta, 5.0);\n  float specComponent = nDotL * pow(nDotH, 2.0 / (roughness + 0.0001));\n  vec3 specular = ((sunLightColor.rgb * sunLightColor.a) * fresnel) * specComponent;\n  vec3 diffuse = (((sunLightColor.rgb * sunLightColor.a) * (1.0 - metallic)) * albedo) * nDotL;\n  float rim = pow(1.0 - max(dot(computedNormal, viewDir), 0.0), 2.5) * (1.0 - metallic);\n  float rimFacing = max(dot(computedNormal, rimDir), 0.0);\n  vec3 rimLight = (((rimLightColor.rgb * rimLightColor.a) * rim) * (0.15 + 0.85 * rimFacing)) * (0.15 + 0.35 * ambientOcclusion);\n  float mipLevel = roughness * environmentMipCount;\n  vec3 envColor = (textureLod(environmentMap, reflectDir, mipLevel)).rgb;\n  float shadow = 0.0;\n  if (useShadow) {\n    vec3 projCoords = vPosLightSpace.xyz / vPosLightSpace.w;\n    projCoords = projCoords * 0.5 + vec3(0.5, 0.5, 0.5);\n    if (((((projCoords.z <= 1.0) && (0.0 <= projCoords.x)) && (projCoords.x <= 1.0)) && (0.0 <= projCoords.y)) && (projCoords.y <= 1.0)) {\n      float bias = max(shadowBias, 0.002 * (1.0 - dot(computedNormal, sunDir)));\n      float total = 0.0;\n      float weightSum = 0.0;\n      for(int ix = 0; ix < 5; ix++) {\n        for(int iy = 0; iy < 5; iy++) {\n          int x = ix - 2;\n          int y = iy - 2;\n          float wx = 1.0 - abs(float(x)) * 0.25;\n          float wy = 1.0 - abs(float(y)) * 0.25;\n          float w = wx * wy;\n          vec2 offset = vec2(float(x), float(y)) * shadowMapTexelSize;\n          float lit = texture(shadowMap, vec3(projCoords.xy + offset, projCoords.z - bias));\n          total += w * lit;\n          weightSum += w;\n        };\n      }\n      shadow = 1.0 - total / weightSum;\n    }\n  }\n  if (debugViewMode == 1) {\n    fragColor = vec4(albedo * tint.rgb, (fragColor).a * tint.a);\n  } else if (debugViewMode == 2) {\n    fragColor = vec4(computedNormal * 0.5 + vec3(0.5, 0.5, 0.5), (fragColor).a);\n  } else if (debugViewMode == 3) {\n    fragColor = vec4(ambientOcclusion, ambientOcclusion, ambientOcclusion, (fragColor).a);\n  } else if (debugViewMode == 4) {\n    fragColor = vec4(metallic, metallic, metallic, (fragColor).a);\n  } else if (debugViewMode == 5) {\n    float specularMap = clamp(dot(f0mix, vec3(0.3333333, 0.3333333, 0.3333333)) * (1.0 - roughness * 0.5), 0.0, 1.0);\n    fragColor = vec4(specularMap, specularMap, specularMap, (fragColor).a);\n  } else {\n    vec3 direct = (specular + diffuse) * (1.0 - shadow);\n    vec3 ambient = ((albedo * ambientLightColor.rgb) * ambientLightColor.a) * ambientOcclusion;\n    vec3 lo = (direct + ambient) + rimLight;\n    vec3 litColor = mix(lo, envColor, fresnel * metallic);\n    if (0.0 < transmission) {\n      float glassMix = clamp((0.35 + transmission * 0.55) + roughness * 0.1, 0.0, 1.0);\n      litColor = mix(litColor, envColor, glassMix);\n      litColor = litColor * mix(1.0, 0.82, transmission);\n      fragColor.a = (fragColor).a * mix(1.0, 0.08 + roughness * 0.2, transmission);\n    }\n    litColor += emissiveValue;\n    fragColor = vec4(litColor, (fragColor).a) * tint;\n  }\n}\n"
Source   Edit   
PbrVertexShader = "#version 410\n// from gltfPbrVert\n\nuniform mat4 lightSpace;\nuniform mat3 normalMatrix;\nuniform mat4 model;\nuniform mat4 jointMatrices[128];\nuniform mat4 proj;\nuniform bool useSkinning;\nuniform mat4 view;\n\nvec3 safeNormalize(vec3 v);\nmat4 identityMat4();\n\nvec3 safeNormalize(\n  vec3 v\n) {\n  vec3 result;\n  result = ((0.0 < length(v)) ? (normalize(v)) : (vec3(0.0, 0.0, 0.0)));\n  return result;\n}\nmat4 identityMat4(\n) {\n  mat4 result;\n  result = mat4(1.0);\n  return result;\n}\n\nin vec3 vertexPosition;\nin vec4 vertexColor;\nin vec3 vertexNormal;\nin vec2 vertexUV;\nin vec4 vertexTangent;\nin uvec4 vertexJoints;\nin vec4 vertexWeights;\nin vec2 vertexUV1;\nout vec3 worldPos;\nout vec4 color;\nout vec3 normal;\nout vec2 uv;\nout vec2 uv1;\nout vec3 tangent;\nout vec3 bitangent;\nout vec4 vPosLightSpace;\n\nvoid main() {\n  mat4 skin = identityMat4();\n  if (useSkinning) {\n    skin = ((vertexWeights.x * jointMatrices[int(vertexJoints.x)] + vertexWeights.y * jointMatrices[int(vertexJoints.y)]) + vertexWeights.z * jointMatrices[int(vertexJoints.z)]) + vertexWeights.w * jointMatrices[int(vertexJoints.w)];\n  }\n  vec4 skinnedPosition = skin * vec4(vertexPosition, 1.0);\n  vec3 skinnedNormal = (skin * vec4(vertexNormal, 0.0)).xyz;\n  vec3 skinnedTangent = (skin * vec4(vertexTangent.xyz, 0.0)).xyz;\n  worldPos = (model * skinnedPosition).xyz;\n  color = vertexColor;\n  uv = vertexUV;\n  uv1 = vertexUV1;\n  vec3 n = safeNormalize(normalMatrix * skinnedNormal);\n  vec3 rawTangent = (model * vec4(skinnedTangent, 0.0)).xyz;\n  vec3 t = safeNormalize(rawTangent - n * dot(n, rawTangent));\n  normal = n;\n  tangent = t;\n  bitangent = cross(n, tangent) * vertexTangent.w;\n  vPosLightSpace = lightSpace * vec4(worldPos, 1.0);\n  gl_Position = ((proj * view) * model) * skinnedPosition;\n}\n"
Source   Edit   
ShadowDepthFragmentShader = "#version 410\n// from gltfShadowDepthFrag\n\nuniform float alphaCutoff;\nuniform vec4 baseColorFactor;\nuniform sampler2D sampleTex;\n\nin vec2 fragmentUv;\n\nvoid main() {\n  if (0.0 <= alphaCutoff) {\n    vec4 texColor = texture(sampleTex, fragmentUv) * baseColorFactor;\n    if (texColor.a < alphaCutoff) {\n      discard;\n    }\n  }\n}\n"
Source   Edit   
ShadowDepthVertexShader = "#version 410\n// from gltfShadowDepthVert\n\nuniform mat4 model;\nuniform mat4 jointMatrices[128];\nuniform mat4 proj;\nuniform bool useSkinning;\nuniform mat4 view;\n\nmat4 identityMat4();\nmat4 skinMatrix(uvec4 vertexJoints, vec4 vertexWeights);\n\nmat4 identityMat4(\n) {\n  mat4 result;\n  result = mat4(1.0);\n  return result;\n}\nmat4 skinMatrix(\n  uvec4 vertexJoints,\n  vec4 vertexWeights\n) {\n  mat4 result;\n  result = ((vertexWeights.x * jointMatrices[int(vertexJoints.x)] + vertexWeights.y * jointMatrices[int(vertexJoints.y)]) + vertexWeights.z * jointMatrices[int(vertexJoints.z)]) + vertexWeights.w * jointMatrices[int(vertexJoints.w)];\n  return result;\n}\n\nin vec3 vertexPosition;\nin vec2 vertexUV;\nin uvec4 vertexJoints;\nin vec4 vertexWeights;\nout vec2 fragmentUv;\n\nvoid main() {\n  fragmentUv = vertexUV;\n  mat4 skin = ((useSkinning) ? (skinMatrix(vertexJoints, vertexWeights)) : (identityMat4()));\n  gl_Position = (((proj * view) * model) * skin) * vec4(vertexPosition, 1.0);\n}\n"
Source   Edit   
SkyboxFragmentShader = "#version 410\n// from gltfSkyboxFrag\n\nuniform samplerCube environmentMap;\nuniform float lod;\n\nin vec3 rayDir;\nout vec4 fragColor;\n\nvoid main() {\n  vec3 dir = normalize(rayDir);\n  vec3 up = ((abs(dir.z) < 0.999) ? (vec3(0.0, 0.0, 1.0)) : (vec3(1.0, 0.0, 0.0)));\n  vec3 tangent = normalize(cross(up, dir));\n  vec3 bitangent = cross(dir, tangent);\n  float spread = lod * 0.015;\n  vec4 colorValue = vec4(0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0);\n  for(int i = 0; i < 16; i++) {\n    float t = float(i) / 16.0;\n    float angle = (t * 2.0) * 3.141592653589793;\n    float r = sqrt(t);\n    vec2 offset = (vec2(cos(angle), sin(angle)) * r) * spread;\n    vec3 sampleDir = normalize((dir + tangent * offset.x) + bitangent * offset.y);\n    colorValue += textureLod(environmentMap, sampleDir, lod);\n  }\n  fragColor = colorValue / 16.0;\n}\n"
Source   Edit   
SkyboxVertexShader = "#version 410\n// from gltfSkyboxVert\n\nuniform mat4 invView;\nuniform mat4 invProj;\n\nin vec2 vertexPosition;\nout vec3 rayDir;\n\nvoid main() {\n  gl_Position = vec4(vertexPosition.x, vertexPosition.y, 1.0, 1.0);\n  vec4 far = invProj * vec4(vertexPosition.x, vertexPosition.y, 1.0, 1.0);\n  rayDir = mat3(invView) * far.xyz;\n}\n"
Source   Edit   
VertexEntryPoint = "main"
Source   Edit  

Procs

    ...raises: [GLerror], tags: [], forbids: [].}

Source   Edit   
proc drawPbr(node: Node; transform, view, proj: Mat4; tint: Color;
             useTrs = true; ambientLightColor = color(0.1, 0.1, 0.1, 1);
             sunLightDirection = vec3(1, 4, 2);
             sunLightColor = color(1, 1, 1, 1);
             rimLightDirection = vec3(-1, 1, -1);
             rimLightColor = color(0, 0, 0, 0); debugView = dvLit;
             cameraPosition = vec3(0, 0, 10)) {.
    ...raises: [Exception, GLerror, GltfError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Draws a node tree with PBR shading. Source   Edit   
proc drawPbrWithShadow(node: Node; transform, view, proj: Mat4; tint: Color;
                       sunLightDirection = vec3(1, 4, 2); useTrs = true;
                       ambientLightColor = color(0.1, 0.1, 0.1, 1);
                       sunLightColor = color(1, 1, 1, 1);
                       rimLightDirection = vec3(-1, 1, -1);
                       rimLightColor = color(0, 0, 0, 0); debugView = dvLit;
                       cameraPosition = vec3(0, 0, 10)) {.
    ...raises: [Exception, GLerror, GltfError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Draws a node tree with PBR shading and shadows. Source   Edit   
proc drawSkybox(view, proj: Mat4; lod: float32 = 0.0) {....raises: [GLerror],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Draws the skybox using a full-screen quad. Source   Edit   
proc endFrame(renderer: Renderer) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc loadDefaultEnvironmentMap() {....raises: [GLerror, PixieError], tags: [],
                                   forbids: [].}
Loads a small procedural studio cubemap. Source   Edit   
proc loadEnvironmentMap(cubeMapPath: string) {....raises: [GLerror, PixieError],
    tags: [RootEffect, ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Loads an environment map from a cube texture path. Source   Edit   
proc loadSolidEnvironmentMap(color = rgbx(180, 190, 220, 255)) {.
    ...raises: [GLerror], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Loads a solid-color cubemap. Source   Edit

    ...raises: [GLerror, Exception, GltfError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}

Sets up the PBR rendering system.
